fincast.source_series: Causal one-second sampled best-bid/best-ask midpoint state. Hold only the last observed state for at most five seconds; never interpolate toward a future observation and reject older state.
fincast.use: Frozen zero-shot point and quantile forecasts become causal numeric features; FinCast cannot submit, size, veto, or approve orders.

ai_contract.paired_uplift_test: Compare categorical_payoff_lightgbm and categorical_payoff_lightgbm_fincast on identical endpoints, targets, costs, seeds, policy, and replay. AI passes only with better proper score and after-cost paired economics without worse drawdown.
ai_contract.qwen_risk_reviewer: Not part of this alpha screen. It remains an asynchronous veto-only safety component after every deterministic gate passes.

chronological_roles.role_boundary_rule: Every feature timestamp, entry, path quote, exit, and target must remain inside one role.

claims.reason: This short historical interval is a consumed-development mechanism screen and FinCast pretraining membership cannot be independently excluded.

data_contract.book_depth_limit: Binance sampled aggregate percentage-band depth only; it is not full L2, message-by-message depth, or queue-position evidence.
data_contract.event_sources: Official Binance Data Vision USD-M daily archives
data_contract.persistent_warehouse: DuckDB on the external E: data volume; archive cache and evidence must not use the system SSD.

economic_screen.expansion_action: Only a passing mechanism expands to the complete 320-day exact-BBO intersection, followed by new live shadow evidence. This screen can never promote a model.
economic_screen.selection_rule: For a flat symbol, require all seeds to predict positive after-cost mean and mean profitable probability above 0.50; select the side with the higher worst-seed mean and abstain on ties.
economic_screen.stress_rule: Reprice the identical base ledger with the frozen stress protection delay and two additional basis points per side; do not reselect trades.

execution_target.entry_and_exit: Cross the contemporaneous ask to enter long and bid to exit long; reverse for short. Enforce quote age, L1 participation, decision latency, and non-overlap.

candidates.target: Separate long and short exact after-cost net-bps conditional means trained by unweighted squared error.
Separate long and short categorical distributions of exact after-cost payoff in stop-risk units trained by unweighted multinomial log loss.

candidates.single_change: Append only the frozen causal FinCast point/quantile features to the identical categorical candidate.

categorical_target.bin_representatives: Exact arithmetic mean training payoff in each bin; no clipping, winsorization, or outcome weighting.
categorical_target.normalization: Exact net payoff bps divided by the causal stop width bps.
categorical_target.probability_calibration: One bounded positive temperature per side and seed fitted only on calibration multinomial log loss.

model_contract.short_preflight: One-seed numerical, target-support, and training/early-stop run may precede the full screen. Evaluation economics cannot be inspected before the frozen full run.

objective: Test whether a replay-aligned distribution of exact after-cost payoffs repairs Round 50's selected-tail error, and whether a real finance-specific foundation model adds measurable edge over the same deterministic model.

predecessor_evidence.finding: Round 50's selected tail understated stop probability and overstated take-profit probability for both sides; neither pooled nor symbol calibration produced positive economics.

pre_evaluation_correction.failed_run_result: SOL short early-stop class support failed before all models were trained.
pre_evaluation_correction.resolution: Correct event-time-to-clock-time BBO state sampling and retain the frozen class-support gate.

ai: The FinCast candidate must improve average side ranked-probability skill by at least 0.005 over the matched categorical model.
The FinCast candidate must improve average side expected-payoff Spearman by at least 0.005 without degrading expected-payoff MSE by more than 1%.
Paired base and stress daily-return uplift must be positive, with no worse drawdown or profit factor.
distribution: Positive evaluation multinomial-log-loss and ranked-probability skill versus training prevalence for each side.
Positive expected-payoff MSE skill versus the training conditional mean and minimum Spearman 0.03 for each side.
Maximum 10-bin profitable-probability calibration error 0.05 and positive skill in at least four of six evaluation days per side.
numerical: All source checksums, feature rows, labels, model outputs, probabilities, and replay cash flows are finite and hash-bound.
No feature or target crosses a chronological role boundary.
DirectML FinCast and OpenCL LightGBM record no CPU fallback.
Every model reloads exactly and every categorical distribution sums to one within 1e-6.

research_basis.use: Categorical distributional targets can be more stable than scalar regression on noisy values.
A useful probabilistic regressor requires distribution-level calibration, not only rank.
FinCast is a 1B-parameter finance-specific point/quantile foundation model trained across financial domains and resolutions.
DirectML is the cross-vendor Windows GPU backend; actual compatibility is established by the tracked host preflight, not documentation alone.
BookTicker publishes best-bid or best-ask changes; causal clock-time sampling therefore holds the last observed state, while this design expires state after five seconds.
